command: input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE -- '--no-minimum-release-age|--minimum-release-age[= ]+0|--ignore-min-release-age'; then jq -n '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",permissionDecision:"deny",permissionDecisionReason:"BLOCKED: --no-minimum-release-age (or equivalent --minimum-release-age=0) bypasses bun/npm protection against freshly-published packages (supply-chain risk). Wait for the release age window, or download the tarball directly with curl from registry.npmjs.org and inspect it."}}' && exit 0; fi; exit 0
